_comment: ══ TESTIMONIALS ══ Add/remove/edit freely. Keep quotes under ~40 words for best card layout.

testimonials.quote: Wajahat automated our entire lead pipeline. Enquiries that used to sit for hours are now qualified and booked in minutes. Our agents finally focus on closing, not admin.
testimonials.name: Ahmed Al Mansoori

testimonials.quote: The WhatsApp automation alone paid for itself in the first month. Cold leads we had written off started booking viewings again. Genuinely transformative.
testimonials.name: Sarah Thompson

testimonials.quote: Professional, fast and deeply technical. He didn't just build automations — he redesigned how our sales team works. Hours of manual CRM work simply disappeared.
testimonials.name: Omar Khalid

testimonials.quote: Our AI concierge answers in Arabic and English, day and night. Clients think it's a human. The quality of engineering behind it is exceptional.
testimonials.name: Fatima Al Zahra
